bead.title: update: honor global and project plugin install layers
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)

`ddx update` must update the same install layer the operator selected. `ddx update --global` should mutate only the global plugin tree and global installed state, while plain `ddx update` should mutate only the active project install in in-tree or convention mode. This can be implemented independently from install, init, lookup, doctor, and docs.

ROOT CAUSE
- `cli/cmd/update.go:57` owns the `ddx update` command flow and is the point where `--global` must branch away from project update behavior.
- `cli/cmd/update.go:204` updates project state and must continue to respect `ddxroot.Path()` for in-tree versus convention mode.
- `cli/cmd/update.go:296` is the global update path and must operate exclusively under `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/`.
- `cli/cmd/install.go:213` remaps install targets and should be reused or mirrored so update writes plugin content and skill links to the correct layer.

PROPOSED FIX
Add or verify `--global` on `ddx update`. In global mode, load global installed state, reinstall or refresh only `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/`, and refresh home-tier skill links under `~/.claude/skills/<name>` and `~/.agents/skills/<name>` without touching project `.ddx/` or project skill links. Without `--global`, update the project install under `ddxroot.Path()/plugins/<name>/`; in in-tree mode that is `<project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/`, and in convention mode it is `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<host>/<owner>/<repo>/plugins/<name>/`.

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a.
- Depends on ddx-06cbaa90: update paths route through `ddxroot.Path()` and `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/`.
- ADR-027 skill install topology or equivalent must stay consistent with update behavior.

PARENT
- ddx-602ae31a

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90

NON-SCOPE
- Removing the existing per-project install entirely; global and per-project modes coexist.
- Migrating `~/.config/ddx/` legacy paths if any exist.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex-facing `.agents/skills`; add others only when those harnesses define their skill paths.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject` asserts `ddx update --global` updates only the global plugin tree and does not modify project plugin content or project skill links.
2. `TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode` asserts plain `ddx update` updates the project install in whichever mode is active: `<project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/` for in-tree mode and `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<host>/<owner>/<repo>/plugins/<name>/` for convention mode.
3. `TestUpdateGlobal_RefreshesAgentTierLinks` asserts global update refreshes `~/.claude/skills/<name>` and `~/.agents/skills/<name>` from the global plugin tree.
4. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/registry/... -run 'TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject|TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode|TestUpdateGlobal_RefreshesAgentTierLinks' -count=1` passes.
5. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/registry/...` passes.
6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
